scope: Compliance release, block/evidence request and audit UI proof boundaries for S040, S041 and S042.

evidence: Added EPIC-11 compliance review release contract attributes to release confirmation boundary and modal lifecycle.
Kept release action, export/share/client response boundaries separate in visible product language.
Removed visible release-scope explainer panel from modal.
Added EPIC-11 contract, page-family, process and negative acceptance attributes to block and evidence request surfaces.
Replaced process explanation copy with product-native blocked-review, evidence-owner and release-locked state.
Removed visible current-hold explainer panel from modal.
Added EPIC-11 contract, page-family, process and audit negative acceptance attributes to the audit surface.
Removed the redundant audit object review panel and summary duplication.
Replaced visible process/audit-proof language with audit fields, exceptions, export lock and review rows.
Added visible-text regression guard that reads rendered innerText and fails on process/proof/gate explainer phrases.
Kept proof assertions in hidden attributes and tests instead of operational UI copy.

negative_acceptance: No visible EPIC-11 route body may contain decision-room handoff only, release-control worksurface, release-gated, advisor approval alone, separate controls, display-only audit, audit visibility is not audit persistence, permission approval, process-first, proof boundary, typed workflow command, existing audited workflow or client acceptance explainer copy.
S040 release confirmation cannot label release as client acceptance, export ready or download ready.
S041 block/evidence request cannot label evidence request as release, export or client acceptance.
S042 audit rows cannot count visible audit display as persisted release proof.
deviations: No schema or API changes were required for this subtask.
Screenshots are UI proof only; persisted audit/release behavior remains covered by service and contract tests.
